cli.name: openclaw
cli.description: Personal AI assistant - Multi-channel AI gateway with extensible messaging integrations

error.network: Network error: Unable to connect to {{host}}:{{port}}
error.portInUse:
Port {{port}} is already in use. Try:
  openclaw gateway --port {{altPort}}
error.rateLimited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.

suggestion.portInUse: Tip: Use 'lsof -i :{{port}}' to check which process is using the port.
suggestion.network: Check your network connection and firewall settings.
suggestion.authFailed: Verify your API key or token is correct.
suggestion.checkConfig: Run 'openclaw doctor' to diagnose configuration issues.
suggestion.runDoctor: Try running 'openclaw doctor --fix' to auto-fix common issues.
suggestion.general:
If the problem persists, please check the logs or submit an issue at:
  https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/issues

tip.controlUi: Open browser to access Control UI for configuration

options.force: --force                 Force stop (don't wait for requests to complete)
options.graceful: --graceful              Graceful restart (wait for connections to close)

help.portConflict: Tip: Use 'lsof -i :{{port}}' to find the process using this port

channels.description: Manage and configure messaging channels (WeChat/Feishu/Telegram etc.)

list.title: Configured Messaging Channels
list.tip: 💡 Use 'openclaw channels add' to add a new channel

connect.qrPrompt: 📱 Please scan QR code with your phone:

disconnect.confirm: Are you sure you want to disconnect {{channel}}? (y/N)

suggestion.checkCredentials: Check your channel credentials and API keys

welcome.title: Welcome to OpenClaw! 🦞
welcome.subtitle: Let's spend a few minutes completing initial setup.

prompt.apiKey: 🔑 Enter API Key (leave empty to configure later)

hint.multiselect: Space to select/deselect, ↑↓ to move, Enter to confirm

onboard.cancelled: Setup cancelled. You can restart anytime with 'openclaw onboard'.

complete.step3Desc: Send a message to test AI assistant capabilities
complete.documentation: Need more help? View docs: https://docs.openclaw.ai

help.command: help [command]  Display help for specific command
